channel.title: Hourly Kabir Das Dohas
channel.description: Timeless wisdom by Sant Kabir Das

item.title: एक ही साधे सब सधे, सब साधे सब जाय । माली सींचे मूल को, फूले फले अघाय ॥
item.description:
Meaning: Master one essential thing to gain everything.

Translation: Master one to gain all.
item.guid: एक ही साधे सब सधे, सब साधे सब जाय । माली सींचे मूल को, फूले फले अघाय ॥493667

item.title: काल करे सो आज कर, आज करे सो अब । पल में प्रलय होएगी, बहुरि करेगा कब ॥
item.description:
Meaning: Do tomorrow's work today, and today's work right now.

Translation: Tomorrow's work do today, today's work now. If the moment is lost, how will the work be done?
item.guid: काल करे सो आज कर, आज करे सो अब । पल में प्रलय होएगी, बहुरि करेगा कब ॥493668

item.title: बुरा जो देखन मैं चला, बुरा न मिलिया कोय । जो दिल खोजा आपना, मुझसे बुरा न कोय ॥
item.description:
Meaning: I searched the world for bad people but found none. When I looked inside my own heart, I realized I am the worst of all.

Translation: I went searching for the wicked, but found no one. When I searched my own heart, I found no one worse than me.
item.guid: बुरा जो देखन मैं चला, बुरा न मिलिया कोय । जो दिल खोजा आपना, मुझसे बुरा न कोय ॥493669
